name: Menace under Otari
description: A Beginner Box adventure. Goblins, kobolds, and shadow creatures threaten the town of Otari from beneath.

encounters.name: Cellar Spiders
encounters.description: Giant spiders lurk in the general store's cellar.

encounters.name: Cellar Vermin
encounters.description: A giant fly and a spider feed on the cellar stores.

encounters.name: Goblin Ambush
encounters.description: Goblins ambush intruders at the cavern entrance.

encounters.name: Kobold Guards
encounters.description: Kobold warriors and a scout guard the tunnels.

encounters.name: Kobold Traps
encounters.description: A kobold trapmaster and warriors defend a trapped corridor.

encounters.name: Boss Zolgran
encounters.description: Kobold Boss Zolgran and a kobold mage defend their lair.

encounters.name: Umbral Gnome Guards
encounters.description: Umbral gnome warriors and a scout guard the shadow passage.

encounters.name: Shadow Creatures
encounters.description: A shadow twigjack and shadow bat haunt the depths.

encounters.name: Drow Guards
encounters.description: Drow warriors and a sneak patrol the shadow tunnels.

encounters.name: Shadow Priest
encounters.description: A shadow priest and gargoyle guard the final approach.

encounters.name: Orc Camp
encounters.description: Orc veterans and their commander hold the lower caves.

encounters.name: Minotaur Hunter
encounters.description: A minotaur hunter stalks the final caverns.

encounters.name: Horned Dragon
encounters.description: A juvenile horned dragon—the final boss—guards the deepest treasure.
